title: Lazer Hunters
description: Experience the cultural phenomenon: the story and adventures of Brick LeFever.
quote: I promise you! I’ll search the entire galaxy to find out who poisoned your entrée.
altHero: Brick LeFever holding a gun with his arm out
alt1: Brick LeFever holding an alien woman who is dying
alt3: Brick LeFever with a man that looks just like him at a funeral
alt4: Brick LeFever holding a sword in front of huge flames
